100: 〉 Beyond the door waits Stephen,
dressed in his usual red suit and
seated in his wheelchair.
[END]
101: (Stephen) Hello. Seems like you were able to 
meet with the messiahs from the other 
universes.
[->]That leaves just one more...
[END]
102: 〉 Stephen produces the last messiah's
soul and holds it up to you.
[END]
103: (Stephen) (Stephen) He is called the Hero... 
[->]Right now, he is only a soul...
He has forgotten who he is.
[->]I want you to restore him to his
former self.
[END]
104: 〉 The messiah's soul leaves Stephen's 
hand and floats into the air.
[END]
105: (Stephen) By observing you, he should recall 
his own life as a messiah...
[->]To that end, I will do my own part. 
You just show us your potential.
[END]
200: 〉 Stephen leans back in his chair and
gestures toward the floating soul.
[END]
201: (Stephen) It would seem he managed to regain
his original form by observing our
fight.
[END]
202: 〉 The Hero's soul twists into a human
shape and gradually begins to become
living flesh...
[END]
203: (The Hero) [7a 3]I remember...
[->]This is me... Existence called me...
I still have much to do.
[->]Thank you, child. Because of you,
I am whole again.
[END]
204: 〉 The Hero bows to you.
[END]
205: (Stephen) [7a 64426]Good, he remembers who he was.
Unfortunately, this is not the end...
[->]He's not the only one affected by
YHVH's defeat.
[END]
206: 〉 As Stephen says that, the door 
behind you opens.
[END]
207: (Demi−fiend) [7a 6]Hey. You took too long, so I came 
to find you.
[END]
208: Looks like this was good timing.
[END]
209: (Flynn) [7a 187]What exactly are we supposed to do?
[END]
210: (Stephen) [7a 64425]The players are all here... Let us 
begin, then.
[END]
211: 〉 Stephen stands up from his 
wheelchair and calmly faces the
five of you.
[END]
212: (Stephen) We are short on time... All of you,
come at me at once.
[->]Fight me, remember who you were.
[END]
213: 〉 You feel an immense energy radiating 
from Stephen. A knot forms in your 
chest...
[END]
214: (Flynn) [7a 187]It seems avoiding combat isn't an
option.
[END]
215: (Demi−fiend) [7a 6]I don't want to hear you complaing
that we didn't fight you one on one
after this...
[END]
216: (Aleph) [7a 4]This imposing presence... He is no 
ordinary opponent. Be on your guard.
[END]
217: (The Hero) [7a 3]I can't lose−−there's still something
I need to do!
[END]
301: 〉 Stephen disappears, leaving only 
the messiahs.
[END]
302: (Demi−fiend) [7a 6]Did we win...?
[END]
303: (The Hero) [7a 3]Yes, we beat Stephen. Now all we 
have to do is find our way back to
our own universes.
[END]
304: (Aleph) [7a 4]Yeah, I still have much to do...
I can't put it off indefinitely.
[END]
305: (Flynn) [7a 187]We all have things we need to do. 
It's sad that things ended this way,
but the time to return home is now.
[END]
306: 〉 A wormhole suddenly appears before
you. It seems you can return to your 
world through it...
[END]
307: (Aleph) [7a 4]I have to defeat YHVH with my partner...
[->]Thank you, [Flynn]. Goodbye.
[END]
308: (Demi−fiend) [7a 6]I'll head back to my universe and
defeat YHVH. Lucifer's waiting.
[->]See ya, [Flynn]. Hope we meet again.
[END]
309: (Flynn) [7a 187]I must obtain hope with my friends 
and remove a dome of rock separating
two countries...
[->]I am grateful to you, [Flynn]. 
I hope we meet again.
[END]
310: (The Hero) [7a 3]I need to return to my own universe 
and explore possibilities with the 
revived goddess.
[->]Law, Chaos, Neutral... I still don't 
know which is the right path.
[->]Maybe there isn't one. But I need to
learn what the people desire most.
[->]When I find the answer, I'll be sure 
to tell you. Let's meet again when 
I do.
[END]
311: 〉 The messiahs leave. You are the 
only one left...
[END]
312: (En no Ozuno's voice) [7a 64429]Now it is your turn. Pass through 
and return to your world.
[END]
313: 〉 You turn around to find En no Ozuno 
standing before you.
[END]
314: (En no Ozuno) [7a 64429]I just came to see you off. 
...Good work, [Flynn].
[->]But, this isn't necessarily the end.
[->]The universe is vast. There are many 
worlds.
[->]More people like you will no doubt 
be born and weave their own tales.
[->]I can't meet them all as we have, but...
Well, it's nice to have a little
excitement from time to time.
[->]Farewell...
[END]
